    Class Description
    CancelTektonPipelineRunOptions
    The cancelTektonPipelineRun options.
    CancelTektonPipelineRunOptions.Builder
    Builder.
    CdTektonPipeline
    Continuous Delivery Tekton pipeline API definition <br><br> Maximum request payload size is 512 KB <br><br> All calls require an <strong>Authorization</strong> HTTP header.
    CdTektonPipelineExamples
    This class contains examples of how to use the CD Tekton Pipeline service.
    CdToolchain  
    CdToolchainExamples
    This class contains examples of how to use the CD Toolchain service.

    Definition
    Tekton pipeline definition entry object, consisting of a repository url, a repository path and a branch or tag.
    DefinitionsCollection
    Pipeline definitions is a collection of individual definition entries, each entry consists of a repository URL, a repository path, and a branch or tag.
    DefinitionsCollectionDefinitionsItem
    Tekton pipeline definition entry object, consisting of a repository url, a repository path and a branch or tag.
    DefinitionSource
    Source repository containing the Tekton pipeline definition.
    DefinitionSource.Builder
    Builder.
    DefinitionSourceProperties
    Properties of the source, which define the URL of the repository and a branch or tag.
    DefinitionSourceProperties.Builder
    Builder.
    DefinitionSourcePropertiesTool
    Reference to the repository tool, in the parent toolchain, that contains the pipeline definition.
    DefinitionSourcePropertiesTool.Builder
    Builder.

    Only needed for Generic Webhook trigger type.
    GenericSecret.Algorithm

    Log
    Log data for Tekton pipeline run steps.
    LogsCollection
    List of pipeline run log objects.
    PipelineRun
    Single Tekton pipeline run object.
    PipelineRun.Status
    Status of the pipeline run.
    PipelineRunsCollection
    Tekton pipeline runs object.
    PipelineRunsCollectionFirst
    First page of pipeline runs.
    PipelineRunsCollectionLast
    Last page of pipeline runs relative to the `start` and `limit` params.
    PipelineRunsCollectionNext
    Next page of pipeline runs relative to the `start` and `limit` params.
    PipelineRunsCollectionPipelineRunsItem
    Single Tekton pipeline run object.
    PipelineRunsCollectionPipelineRunsItem.Status
    Status of the pipeline run.
    PipelineRunTrigger
    Trigger details passed when triggering a Tekton pipeline run.
    PipelineRunTrigger.Builder
    Builder.
    PipelineRunWorker
    Worker details used in this pipeline run.
    PropertiesCollection
    Pipeline properties object.

    ResourceGroupReference
    The resource group in which the pipeline was created.
    RunDefinition
    Reference to the pipeline definition of a pipeline run.
    RunPipeline
    Reference to the pipeline to which a pipeline run belongs.
    RunsFirstPage
    First page of pipeline runs.
    RunsLastPage
    Last page of pipeline runs relative to the `start` and `limit` params.
    RunsNextPage
    Next page of pipeline runs relative to the `start` and `limit` params.
    SdkCommon
    The purpose of this class is to provide SDK-specific HTTP headers to be included in REST API requests made by the SDK.
    StepLog
    Logs for a Tekton pipeline run step.
    TektonPipeline
    Tekton pipeline object.
    TektonPipeline.Status
    Pipeline status.
    TektonPipelinePatch
    Request body used to update this pipeline.
    TektonPipelinePatch.Builder
    Builder.
    TektonPipelineResourceGroup
    The ID of the resource group in which the pipeline was created.
    TektonPipelineRunsPager
    TektonPipelineRunsPager can be used to simplify the use of the "listTektonPipelineRuns" method.
    Tool
    Reference to the repository tool in the parent toolchain.
    Tool.Builder
    Builder.
    Toolchain
    Response structure for GET toolchains.
    ToolchainCollection
    Response structure for GET toolchains.
    ToolchainCollectionFirst
    Information about retrieving first toolchain results from the collection.
    ToolchainCollectionLast
    Information about retrieving last toolchain results from the collection.
    ToolchainCollectionNext
    Information about retrieving next toolchain results from the collection.
    ToolchainCollectionPrevious
    Information about retrieving previous toolchain results from the collection.
    ToolchainEventPost
    Response structure for POST toolchain event.
    ToolchainEventPrototypeData
    Additional data to be added with the event.
    ToolchainEventPrototypeData.Builder
    Builder.
    ToolchainEventPrototypeDataApplicationJson
    Contains JSON data to be added with the event.
    ToolchainEventPrototypeDataApplicationJson.Builder
    Builder.
    ToolchainEventPrototypeDataTextPlain
    Contains text data to be added with the event.
    ToolchainEventPrototypeDataTextPlain.Builder
    Builder.
    ToolchainModel
    Model describing toolchain resource.
    ToolchainPatch
    Response structure for PATCH toolchain.
    ToolchainPost
    Response structure for POST toolchain.
    ToolchainPrototypePatch
    Body structure for the update toolchain PATCH request.
    ToolchainPrototypePatch.Builder
    Builder.
    ToolchainReference
    Toolchain object containing references to the parent toolchain.
    ToolchainsPager
    ToolchainsPager can be used to simplify the use of the "listToolchains" method.
    ToolchainTool
    Response structure for GET tool.
    ToolchainTool.State
    Current configuration state of the tool.
    ToolchainToolCollection
    Response structure for GET tools.
    ToolchainToolCollectionFirst
    Information about retrieving first tool results from the collection.
    ToolchainToolCollectionLast
    Information about retrieving last tool results from the collection.
    ToolchainToolCollectionNext
    Information about retrieving next tool results from the collection.
    ToolchainToolCollectionPrevious
    Information about retrieving previous tool results from the collection.
    ToolchainToolPatch
    Response structure for PATCH tool.
    ToolchainToolPatch.State
    Current configuration state of the tool.
    ToolchainToolPost
    POST tool response body.
    ToolchainToolPost.State
    Current configuration state of the tool.
    ToolchainToolPrototypePatch
    Details on the new tool.
    ToolchainToolPrototypePatch.Builder
    Builder.
    ToolModel
    Model describing tool resource.
    ToolModel.State
    Current configuration state of the tool.
    ToolModelReferent
    Information on URIs to access this resource through the UI or API.
    ToolsPager
    ToolsPager can be used to simplify the use of the "listTools" method.
    Trigger
    Tekton pipeline trigger.
    Trigger.Events
    List of events.
    TriggerGenericTrigger
    Generic webhook trigger, which triggers a pipeline run when the Tekton Pipeline Service receives a POST event with secrets.
    TriggerGenericTriggerPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerGenericTriggerPropertiesItem.Type
    Property type.
    TriggerManualTrigger
    Manual trigger.
    TriggerManualTriggerPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerManualTriggerPropertiesItem.Type
    Property type.
    TriggerPatch
    Tekton pipeline trigger object used for updating the trigger.
    TriggerPatch.Builder
    Builder.
    TriggerPatch.Events
    List of events.
    TriggerPatch.Type
    Trigger type.
    TriggerPropertiesCollection
    Trigger properties object.
    TriggerPropertiesCollectionPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerPropertiesCollectionPropertiesItem.Type
    Property type.
    TriggerPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerPropertiesItem.Type
    Property type.
    TriggerProperty
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerProperty.Type
    Property type.
    TriggerScmTrigger
    Git trigger type.
    TriggerScmTrigger.Events
    List of events.
    TriggerScmTriggerPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerScmTriggerPropertiesItem.Type
    Property type.
    TriggersCollection
    Tekton pipeline triggers object.
    TriggerSource
    Source repository for a Git trigger.
    TriggerSourceProperties
    Properties of the source, which define the URL of the repository and a branch or pattern.

    Properties of the source, which define the URL of the repository and a branch or pattern.

    Builder.
    TriggerSourcePropertiesTool
    Reference to the repository tool in the parent toolchain.
    TriggerSourcePropertiesTool.Builder
    Builder.
    TriggerSourcePrototype
    Source repository for a Git trigger.
    TriggerSourcePrototype.Builder
    Builder.
    TriggerTimerTrigger
    Timer trigger, which triggers pipeline runs according to the provided CRON value and timezone.
    TriggerTimerTriggerPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerTimerTriggerPropertiesItem.Type
    Property type.

    UserInfo
    Information about the user that triggered a pipeline run.
    Worker
    Details of the worker used to run the pipeline.
    WorkerIdentity
    Specify the worker that is to be used to run the trigger, indicated by a worker object with only the worker ID.
